_comment: Research facts for rename-hansard. No training runs; the 'runs' are rename cuts landing on master.
trunk_checks: grep-zero-orphan: every TRAINLINT_ read keeps a fallback after the env flip
substrate-diff: data_root file list identical before/after any move
cookie-probe: an OLD trainlint_token cookie still authenticates after the cloud cut
other-session-clean: git log shows their work merged, not orphaned
